zh.lifeSummary: 當Thomas Wilbraham Lord of Woodhey於1391年出生在英國爾拉德諾時，他的父親Thomas De Wilbraham19歲，母親Margery Leigh15歲。他於1402年與Margaret Golborne在英國英格蘭哈普爾結婚。他們至少是8個兒子和1個女兒的父母。他去世於1467年8月19日在英國爾法潔迪列享年76歲。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Thomas Wilbraham Lord of Woodhey于1391年出生在英国爾拉德諾时，他的父亲Thomas De Wilbraham19岁，母亲Margery Leigh15岁。他于1402年与Margaret Golborne在英国英格兰哈普爾结婚。他们至少是8个儿子和1个女儿的父母。他去世于1467年8月19日在英国爾法潔迪列享年76岁。

nameMeanings.name: Wilbraham
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: English: habitational name from Great and Little Wilbraham (Cambridgeshire). The placename derives from the Old English female personal name Wilburg + Old English hām ‘village, homestead’.

nameMeanings.name: Thomas
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: New Testament name, borne by one of Christ's twelve apostles, referred to as ‘Thomas, called Didymus’ (John 11:16; 20:24). Didymos is the Greek word for ‘twin’, and the name is the Greek form of an Aramaic byname meaning ‘twin’. The given name has always been popular throughout Christendom, in part because St Thomas's doubts have made him seem a very human character.

historicEvents.title: Wars of the Roses
historicEvents.description: Wars of the Roses was a series of English civil wars for control of the throne of England between the royal families House of Lancaster and the House of York. The name of the war was derived as the red rose was the symbol of the Lancastrians and the white rose was the symbol of the Yorks.

en.lifeSummary: When Thomas Wilbraham Lord of Woodhey was born in 1391, in Radnor, Cheshire, England, his father, Thomas De Wilbraham, was 19 and his mother, Margery Leigh, was 15. He married Margaret Golborne in 1402, in Hampshire, England, United Kingdom. They were the parents of at least 8 sons and 1 daughter. He died on 19 August 1467, in Faddiley, Cheshire, England, at the age of 76.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Thomas Wilbraham Lord of Woodhey est né en 1391, à Radnor, Cheshire, Angleterre, son père, Thomas De Wilbraham, avait 19 ans et sa mère, Margery Leigh, avait 15 ans. Il a épousé Margaret Golborne en 1402, à Hampshire, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni. Ils ont eu au moins 8 fils et 1 fille. Il est décédé le 19 août 1467, à Faddiley, Cheshire, Angleterre, à l’âge de 76 ans.

de.lifeSummary: Als Thomas Wilbraham Lord of Woodhey 1391 in Radnor, Cheshire, England geboren wurde, war sein Vater Thomas De Wilbraham 19 und seine Mutter Margery Leigh 15. Er hat 1402 in Hampshire, England, United Kingdom Margaret Golborne geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 8 Söhne und 1 Tochter. Er starb am 19. August 1467 im Alter von 76 Jahren in Faddiley, Cheshire, England.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Thomas Wilbraham Lord of Woodhey è nato il nel 1391 nel Radnor, Cheshire, England, il suo padre, Thomas De Wilbraham, aveva 19 anni e il suo madre, Margery Leigh, aveva 15 anni. Lui sposato Margaret Golborne nel 1402, nel Hampshire, Inghilterra, Regno Unito. Erano genitori di almeno 8 figli e 1 figlia. Morì il 19 agosto 1467, nel Faddiley, Cheshire, England, all'età di 76 anni.

ja.lifeSummary: Thomas Wilbraham Lord of Woodheyが1391年にイギリスチェシュアイアラドノーで生まれた時，父Thomas De Wilbrahamは19歳，母Margery Leighは15歳であった。1402年にイギリスイギリスハンプシュアイアでMargaret Golborneと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも8人の息子と1人の娘の親であった。彼は1467年8月19日にイギリスチェシュアイアファッドイリーで76歳で死去した。

ko.lifeSummary: Thomas Wilbraham Lord of Woodhey(이)가 1391년 영국 체실르 라드너에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 Thomas De Wilbraham(은)는 19세였고, 그의 어머니 Margery Leigh(은)는 15세였다. 그는 1402년 영국 잉글랜드 함프실르에서 Margaret Golborne(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 여덟 명의 아들과 한 명의 딸을 두었다. 그는 1467년 8월 19일 영국 체실르 파디리에서 76세의 나이로 사망했다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Thomas Wilbraham Lord of Woodhey nasceu em 1391, em Radnor, Cheshire, Inglaterra, seu pai, Thomas De Wilbraham, tinha 19 anos e sua mãe, Margery Leigh, tinha 15 anos. Ele casou-se com Margaret Golborne em 1402, em Hampshire, Inglaterra, United Kingdom. Eles tiveram pelo menos 8 filhos e 1 filha. Ele faleceu em 19 de agosto de 1467, em Faddiley, Cheshire, Inglaterra, com 76 anos.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Thomas Wilbraham Lord of Woodhey родился в 1391 г. в местности раднор, чешир, Англия, его отцу по имени Thomas De Wilbraham было 19 лет, а матери, которую звали Margery Leigh, 15. Он женился на женщине по имени Margaret Golborne в 1402 г. в местности хампшир, Англия, Великобритания. У них было по крайней мере 8 сыновей и 1 дочь. Он умер 19 августа 1467 г. в местности фаддили, чешир, Англия в возрасте 76 лет.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Thomas Wilbraham Lord of Woodhey nació en 1391, en Radnor, Cheshire, Inglaterra, su papá, Thomas De Wilbraham, tenía 19 años y su mamá, Margery Leigh, tenía 15 años. Se casó con Margaret Golborne en 1402, en Hampshire, Inglaterra, Reino Unido. Fueron padres de por lo menos 8 hijos y 1 hija. Murió el 19 de agosto de 1467, en Faddiley, Cheshire, Inglaterra, a la edad de 76 años.
